reviews.review_description: I'm only reviewing this in hopes I can save someone the trouble I had getting started.  Game starts in Chinese, and I couldn't figure out where to go to change that.  The farthest tab top right is settings, where you can change to English.  Then in the Beat mode setting, I couldn't figure out how it could get to my music.  Also in Settings, you have to turn off the app permission before it will look for the music.  And you have to create the music folder under the Android/file for the game.  It will provide the exact link. Once you do that, then you can save your music to that newly created folder.  Easy setup after that. The regular courses have to be unlocked in order, so you can't jump ahead.  A little frustrating, but I guess they want to make sure you know all the punches before moving on, and that make sense.  There is an online community that you need a CD key for. Not sure what that is, so I'll keep trying to figure that out. Overall, it certainly makes me sweat! Definitely worth buying.

The game has a charm to it that only anine can bring, and between it's aesthetic (which is colorful and well done) and the upbeat pop you would hear in most light hearted animes- it just has a nice relaxed cheerful vibe to put you in a good place whilst getting in a fun light exercise.
One thing I do wish it had was more personality in the trainers/ coaches, as well as them not having clearly a.i. voices (the two issues together makes them  very robotic).
But that's a notpick more than anything, especially at the bargain-bin price the game sells for, so I get cutting some corners on less important aspects.

So for the price you seem to get a decent amount of content and a workout about as good as one you'd get in similar titles (though a bit more limited of course, unless more variety is introduced in later courses I've yet to get to).

So it's very much worth the low price of entry if you want s good boxing exercise and enjoy (or at least can tolerate) anime aesthetic / anime girls and its music.

It's a steal I recommend snatching up!
Keep building it. Also modify and seated.

what's the CD key? great game tho

no updates yet?
This game is like Fitness Boxing on the Switch except not brutally overpriced and is more fun and you get to add your own tunes to play.  This game is definitely BookTheWin Approved.

developer_response.body: Thank you for supporting our game. The game will continue to be updated and provide more courses and features in the future
